name: GOLFTEC Honolulu
address: 510 Piikoi St Suite W 100, Honolulu, HI 96814
about: GOLFTEC Honolulu is a golf training and fitting studio specializing in data-driven instruction and club fitting. The venue utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion analysis, high-speed video cameras, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing feedback and performance metrics. Services include private golf lessons, custom club fittings, and practice memberships, with coaches creating personalized improvement plans for players of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors provides detailed swing analysis
PGA award-winning coaches offer personalized data-driven instruction
Custom club fittings deliver an average of 21 more yards off the tee

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors mentioned for swing analysis and club fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available, and custom club fitting services are offered to match you with the perfect equipment for your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or beverage services are mentioned. The focus is on golf instruction and practice.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue is a training studio focused on lessons and practice rather than playing full rounds of golf.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is suitable for juniors and youth, with programs and technology designed to help younger golfers improve their game.
